description: Convert a single crystal structure file between formats (CIF, POSCAR, XYZ, JSON, ...) using pymatgen with automatic input-format detection.
rules: read-only — reads one input structure file, writes one converted file
input format auto-detected by pymatgen from file contents/extension
converted file is written under record_store as structure.<OUTPUT_FORMAT>
requires pymatgen present for a real conversion; degrades gracefully (records missing dep, exits 0) when absent
usage: Set INPUT_FILE (path to the source structure) and OUTPUT_FORMAT (target, e.g. cif, poscar, xyz, json). Output: structure.<OUTPUT_FORMAT> plus convert.log under record_store.
limitation: Single-file conversion only (no batch/wildcard). Real output needs pymatgen installed; without it the porter writes a graceful stub and a missing-dependency note.
